stack.description: RuntimeAdapter registry key. Python is real; others are stubs in the PoC.

service_shape.description: Packaging strategy hint for the RuntimeAdapter. lambda = AWS Lambda; wheel = distributable Python; binary = Go/Clojure native binary.

test_root.description: Optional. Where the project's pytest.ini lives (also the cwd dx check passes to pytest). Default by service_shape: lambda → 'test/unit/src/python', wheel → 'tests'. Required only when the project deviates.

work_id_pattern.description: Optional override of the default Work-ID regex. Defaults to the platform-wide '^(LL|GP)-[0-9]+$'.

agents.description: Optional per-agent settings (e.g. amazon_q { app_id, comment_trigger }).

custom_steps.description: Escape hatch — extra steps spliced into dx check / generated workflows.
